text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(I'm still wide awake. At this rate, I'm certain to
end up sleep-deprived tomorrow.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(There's but one recourse. I must focus my mind
by mentally drilling my techniques and clearing
my head of unnecessary thoughts. Restful sleep
will soon be mine!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(I'll practice my strikes to start. Release the
tension in my body, lower my center of gravity,
then strike by letting the weight of my arm deliver
the blow!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What just happened?! Did I perform that strike? It was over in the blink of an eye—no, it was faster than a flash of light!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I may be on the verge of a breakthrough. This
feeling, this state of mind—I must master it
completely!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki ends up staying awake all night
long.
